title: Hitboxes
description: Simple hitbox mod for 1.8 with a couple unique features
body:
## Hitboxes
Simple hitbox mod for Forge 1.8 

## Features
- Individually color player/projectile/mob/other hitboxes
- Individually toggle hitbox eyeline & look vector
- Color player hitboxes according to ping or name color
- Color projectile hitboxes according to who fired them
- Adjust width of outlines

Open config with `/hitboxes`
